2604.27231.title: Upskilling with Generative AI: Practices and Challenges for Freelance Knowledge Workers
2604.27231.paper_summary: Freelance workers must continually acquire new skills to remain competitive in online labor markets, yet they lack the organizational training, mentorship, and infrastructure available to traditional employees. Generative AI-powered tools like ChatGPT are reshaping market skill demands while also offering new forms of on-demand learning support to meet those demands. Despite growing interest in AI-powered learning tools, little is known about how freelancers actually use these tools to learn, the challenges they encounter, and how generative AI for learning interacts with precarity and competition in platform-based work. We present a mixed-methods study combining a survey and semi-structured interviews with freelance knowledge workers. Grounded in self-directed learning theory, we examine how freelancers integrate generative AI tools into their learning practices. Our findings show that freelancers increasingly rely on generative AI to structure learning and support exploratory skill acquisition, but do not treat it as their primary learning resource due to inconsistency, lack of contextual relevance, and verification overhead. We identify a shift from learning as growth to learning as survival, where upskilling is oriented toward immediate market viability rather than long-term development. We also surface a structural challenge we term invisible competencies, in which workers acquire skills through generative AI tools but lack credible ways to signal or validate these skills in competitive freelance markets. Based on these insights, we offer design recommendations for generative AI-powered learning tools for freelancers.
2604.27231.paper_summary_zh: 自由工作者必須不斷獲取新技能，以在在線勞動市場中保持競爭力，但他們缺乏傳統員工所擁有的組織培訓、導師指導和基礎設施。<lb/>像 ChatGPT 這樣的生成式 AI 工具正在重塑市場技能需求，同時也提供新的按需學習支持形式，以滿足這些需求。<lb/>儘管對 AI 驅動的學習工具的興趣日益增長，但對於自由工作者實際上如何使用這些工具進行學習、他們遇到的挑戰，以及生成式 AI 在學習中如何與平台工作中的不穩定性和競爭互動，仍知之甚少。<lb/>我們提出了一項混合方法研究，結合了對自由知識工作者的調查和半結構化訪談。<lb/>基於自我導向學習理論，我們考察了自由工作者如何將生成式 AI 工具整合到他們的學習實踐中。<lb/>我們的研究結果顯示，自由工作者越來越依賴生成式 AI 來結構化學習並支持探索性技能獲取，但由於不一致性、缺乏上下文相關性和驗證負擔，他們並不將其視為主要的學習資源。<lb/>我們發現了一種從成長學習轉變為生存學習的趨勢，其中技能提升的方向是針對即時市場可行性，而非長期發展。<lb/>我們還提出了一個結構性挑戰，稱之為隱形能力，工人通過生成式 AI 工具獲取技能，但在競爭激烈的自由市場中缺乏可信的方式來信號或驗證這些技能。<lb/>基於這些見解，我們為自由工作者的生成式 AI 驅動學習工具提供了設計建議。
2604.27231.author: Kashif Imteyaz et.al.
2604.27231.authors: Kashif Imteyaz, Isabel Lopez, Nakul Rajpal, Hunjun Shin, Saiph Savage
